title: Mundane card set
description: A set of Mundane cards. Cards carry bare ids; the loader composes the namespaced runtime id as `set_id:id`. The `effect` field names an effect from the engine's fixed vocabulary (validated by the engine at load time, not by this schema); `params` is a generic object the engine interprets per effect.

$schema.description: Optional editor/tooling hint; the file is validated against this card-set schema, not the value here.

set_id.description: Namespace for every card in this set; composed with each card id as `set_id:id`.

version.description: Set version: semver (e.g. 1.0.0) or an ISO-8601 date (e.g. 2026-05-31).

id.description: Bare card id, unique within the set; the loader composes `set_id:id`.

cost.description: Time required to play the card.

type.description: One of the engine's five card types.

effect.description: Name of an effect in the engine's fixed vocabulary. Permanents use `none`. The engine rejects unknown names at load time; this schema does not check the vocabulary.

params.description: Generic parameters for the named effect; the engine validates these per effect.
